REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-26-2025 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-23-2025 Continued To Nov-26-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: James Murphy appeared via zoom for Theresa Davis (Administrator).

Mr. Murphy stated that they just received the inventory and appraisal from the probate referee last week, that there are questions about the creditors claim, that there are no monies to pay the creditors claim, and that he will file the correct proof of service for the Notice of Hearing.

The matter is continued to November 26, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Papers to be filed by November 12, 2025.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Lozada. Not reported.
